description: play sounds of different lengths in layers using loops
evaluation_criteria:
{"all_complete_correct":"The workspace uses a play_together block with loops or play_sequential to layer tracks of different lengths together, and uses rests to offset when certain tracks start

Example:
```
play_together
  repeat 4
    play "pack/drums_track_1"
  play_sequential
    rest 1 measure
    repeat 3
      play "pack/bass_track_1"
  play_sequential
    rest 2 measures
    repeat 2
      play "pack/synth_track_3"
```","partial_complete_correct":"The workspace uses a play_together block with loops or play_sequential to layer tracks of different lengths together

Example:
```
play_together
  repeat 2
    play "pack/drums_track_1"
    play "pack/bass_track_1"
 repeat 4
    play "pack/drums_track_2"
    play "pack/bass_track_2"
```

Example:
```
play_together
  repeat 8
    play "pack/drums_track_1"
  play_sequential
    play "pack/vocal_track_1"
    play "pack/vocal_track_2"
    play "pack/vocal_track_3"
    play "pack/vocal_track_4"
```","incomplete_incorrect":"The workspace contains repeat blocks that play sounds of different lengths, but they are played in sequence instead of layered together

Example:
```
repeat 2
  play_together
    play "pack/drums_track_1"
    play "pack/bass_track_1"
repeat 4
  play_together
    play "pack/drums_track_2"
    play "pack/bass_track_2"
```}
